name: poplog
description: A full stack media tracking application built with React, Express, PostgreSQL, Docker, and Vitest.

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix poplog-app"
scripts.test: npm run test:run --prefix poplog-app && npm run test:run --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix poplog-app

author: Nico Caminero
